decomposition.note: 33% effective = 30% principal impôt sur les sociétés + 10% centimes additionnels communaux (CAC) levied on the tax itself: 0.30 * 1.10 = 0.33.

cit.basis: 30% IS + 10% CAC on the tax = 33% effective (Code Général des Impôts du Cameroun).

reduced_regimes.note: Companies with turnover up to XAF 3 billion: 25% principal = 27.5% including CAC. Turnover bands per current Finance Law; not modelled in this SME estimator.

minimum_tax.name: Minimum de perception
minimum_tax.note: 2.2% of turnover incl. CAC (2% + 10% CAC) for the standard (réel) regime; higher rates apply to simplified regimes.

cit.note: Administered by the DGI (Direction Générale des Impôts, Cameroun).

decomposition.note: 19.25% = 17.5% principal VAT + 10% CAC levied on the tax: 0.175 * 1.10 = 0.1925.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Reduced-regime turnover bands, minimum-tax regimes, WHT, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official DGI guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
